start: ^Press Personnel: That went well. You’re lucky you came here before the line got too long.
cnt1: ^Press Personnel: We managed to process your ID right away.
cnt2: ^You: Guess I was just a little more excited than the others.
cnt3: ^Press Personnel: Remember that issuing and I.D. is free for the first time for all new students.
cnt4: ^Press Personnel: Though If you lost or damaged you I.D. and needed a new one reissued, for the second time, we will be giving you a payment slip for that
cnt5: ^You: Is that so? I must take good care of my soon-to-be I.D then.
cnt6: ^Press Personnel: That’s the spirit! Well then, I present to you your University ID. Take a look, did it turn out well?
cnt7: ^You: Yes. I am satisfied. Thank you very much, sir. I will wear it right now.
